telemetry.title: Help improve goose
telemetry.description: Would you like to help improve goose by sharing anonymous usage data? This helps us understand how goose is used and identify areas for improvement.

collectItems.extensions: Extensions and tool usage counts (names only)
collectItems.sessionMetrics: Session metrics (duration, interaction count, token usage)

telemetry.privacyNote: We never collect your conversations, code, tool arguments, error messages, or any personal data. You can change this setting anytime in Settings → App.

privacy.title: Privacy details
privacy.description: Anonymous usage data helps us understand how goose is used and identify areas for improvement.
privacy.privacyNote: We never collect your conversations, code, tool arguments, error messages, or any personal data. You can change this setting anytime in Settings.
